name: ESOPHAGEAL WEB
definition: complete / incomplete circumferential narrowing caused by 1-2-mm thick (vertical length)

demographics.Histo: mucosal membrane covered by squamous epithelium on superior + inferior surfaces

dominant_finding: thin delicate membrane of uniform thickness of < 3 mm
distribution: arises at right angles from anterior esophageal wall
discriminating_features: visualized during maximal distension (in ¹/¹0 of a second)
arises at right angles from anterior esophageal wall
thin delicate membrane of uniform thickness of < 3 mm

general: visualized during maximal distension (in ¹/¹0 of a second)
arises at right angles from anterior esophageal wall
thin delicate membrane of uniform thickness of < 3 mm

clinical.Cx: high risk of upper esophageal + hypopharyngeal (postcricoid) carcinoma
